caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room filled with framed photos on the wall and clothing on racks. He is positioned behind a black microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt, and a black ornate chair is visible. The logos "REALLY RED" appear on the screen. Across the sequence, the man's expression shifts as he speaks. He begins with a slight smile and closed eyes, then opens his eyes while continuing to smile, and eventually transitions to a more neutral expression with his mouth slightly open, before finally looking down with a solemn face. The surrounding environment and equipment remain static throughout the clip.
